summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gmail API integration features. Backend API endpoints work perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend Gmail button and navigation function correctly, but job selection UI has interaction issues preventing full right panel testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting pointer events prevents job card selection
ui_bugs.details: Cannot create/select jobs to test right panel features due to overlay interception. Job creation form fills but Save button clicks are blocked by overlay.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test Interview Prep and Log Email buttons due to job selection failure
integration_issues.details: Right panel only appears when job is selected, but job selection is blocked by modal overlay issues

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/oauth/gmail/login returns valid Google OAuth URL
All existing backend features (auth, jobs CRUD, contacts, AI, interview prep)
Frontend sidebar Gmail Connect button displays correctly
Frontend navigation works (Board, ATS, Contacts, Dashboard)
Frontend ComposeEmailModal structure with To, Subject, Body, Send via Gmail button
Gmail integration properly hidden when not connected
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay pointer event interception in job creation/selection flow. The modal overlay is preventing job cards from being clickable, which blocks testing of right panel features. Need to investigate z-index or pointer-events CSS properties on modal overlays.
